---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for SHAFT_ENGINE
title: "[Feature Request]: "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ''

---

## ✅ Pre-submission Checklist

Please confirm the following before submitting:

- [ ] I have searched [existing issues](https://github.com/ShaftHQ/SHAFT_ENGINE/issues) and this feature has not been requested before.
- [ ] I have checked the [documentation](https://shaftengine.netlify.app/docs/start/overview) and this capability does not already exist.
- [ ] I am using the **latest release** of SHAFT_ENGINE.


## 🎯 Problem Statement

> What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the pain point or limitation you are experiencing.
> A good feature request starts with a concrete problem, not a solution.

<!-- Example: "When testing multi-tab flows, I have to manage raw WebDriver handles manually because SHAFT_ENGINE has no tab-management API. This is error-prone and verbose." -->


## 💡 Proposed Solution

> Describe the feature or change you would like to see. Be as specific as possible.

<!-- Replace this comment with your proposed solution -->


### 🔌 Proposed API (if applicable)

> If your request involves a new API method, show what the ideal developer experience would look like.

```java
// Example of how you would want to call the new feature
driver.browser().tabs().openNewTab("https://example.com");
driver.browser().tabs().switchToTab(1);
```


## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

> What workarounds or alternative approaches have you already tried or considered? Why are they insufficient?

<!-- Replace this comment with alternatives you have considered -->


## 🗂️ Area of the Framework

> Which part(s) of SHAFT_ENGINE does this feature relate to? Check all that apply.

- [ ] Web / Browser automation
- [ ] Mobile (Android / iOS)
- [ ] API testing
- [ ] CLI testing
- [ ] Database testing
- [ ] Reporting / Allure integration
- [ ] Configuration / Properties
- [ ] Locators / Element interactions
- [ ] Test data management
- [ ] CI/CD integration
- [ ] Other: <!-- specify -->


## 📈 Use Case & Impact

> Who benefits from this feature and how often would it be used?

<!-- Example: "Any team running multi-tab E2E tests. This is a daily need for our team and likely for any project testing OAuth flows or file download dialogs." -->


## 📝 Additional Context

> Any other information, links, references, or screenshots that support this request.

<!-- Drag and drop images here, or add links to similar implementations in other frameworks -->
